meta.title: Services
meta.description: Explore Atlas Architecture services: residential and commercial architecture, interior design, renovation, lighting consulting, and construction management.

data.title: From brief to delivery with excellence
data.subtitle: We offer a complete range of services so your project is developed with coherence — from concept to the final detail.

data.headline: Services for every stage of your project
data.intro: Every service is handled by the same lead architect from start to finish — ensuring creative continuity and a coherent final result. We do not outsource or fragment. Your project has one name and one face throughout.

items.name: Interior Design
items.description: Full curation of materials, furniture, lighting, and objects to create environments with personality, harmony, and visual comfort.

items.name: Residential Architecture
items.description: Full project development for houses and apartments, from feasibility study to detailed construction documents, with 3D visualization for approval before construction.

items.name: Commercial Architecture
items.description: Design for stores, restaurants, hotels, and retail spaces — focused on customer experience and brand identity, from floor plan to facade.

items.name: Renovation & Retrofit
items.description: Modernization of existing spaces with precise interventions that respect the structure and maximize results within the available budget.

items.name: Lighting Consulting
items.description: Light shapes how a space is perceived. We design lighting scenarios that reveal textures, guide the eye, and create the exact emotional atmosphere each environment calls for — with precision, beauty, and energy efficiency.

items.name: Construction Management
items.description: Periodic site supervision to ensure faithful execution of the design, quality control, and agile resolution of any on-site issues.

data.headline: A clear process from start to finish
data.subtitle: Every project follows well-defined stages, with transparent communication and your approval at each phase before moving forward.

steps.title: Brief
steps.description: Initial meeting to understand your needs, lifestyle, visual references, and available budget. The project starts here.

steps.title: Preliminary Study
steps.description: First conceptual proposals in plan and perspective, establishing the architectural approach and visual language of the project.

steps.title: 3D Development
steps.description: Project refinement with material and furniture definition. Photorealistic 3D visualization for your full approval before any construction begins.

steps.title: Construction Documents
steps.description: Complete technical documentation: plans, sections, elevations, details, and specifications for precise execution.

steps.title: Permits & Approvals
steps.description: Processing with city hall and building management when required. Coordination with structural and MEP engineering.

steps.title: Construction Management
steps.description: Periodic site visits to ensure faithful execution and resolve any unforeseen issues quickly and safely.

data.headline: Ready to start your project?
data.text: Talk to an Atlas architect and discover how we can transform your space.
